# Sound Bath Calendar

> A curated, weekly-updated calendar of sound baths across Denver and the Front Range: Boulder, Fort Collins, and Colorado Springs. Dates, times, venues, prices, and ticket links for every listed session. Kept by Firstwater (thefirstwater.co).

## Pages

- [The calendar](https://soundbathcalendar.com/): Every sound bath on the Front Range, grouped by time — today, this weekend, this week, and the weeks ahead — with each listing tagged by city (Denver, Boulder, Fort Collins, Colorado Springs). Updated through the week.
- Every listed event has its own page at https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/<slug>/ with the date, time, venue, price, and the operator's ticket link. The full list of current event pages is in the sitemap: https://soundbathcalendar.com/sitemap.xml

## City pages

Each city page is the same time-grouped calendar filtered to one area, with its own summary, FAQ, and event list:

- [Denver](https://soundbathcalendar.com/denver/): Sound baths in Denver, grouped by time (today, this weekend, this week, the weeks ahead).
- [Boulder](https://soundbathcalendar.com/boulder/): Sound baths in Boulder, grouped by time.
- [Fort Collins](https://soundbathcalendar.com/fort-collins/): Sound baths in Fort Collins, grouped by time.
- [Colorado Springs](https://soundbathcalendar.com/colorado-springs/): Sound baths in Colorado Springs, grouped by time.

## Original data (free to cite)

- [State of Sound Healing on the Front Range](https://soundbathcalendar.com/state-of-sound-healing/): An original-data snapshot of the Front Range sound bath scene, derived from every session on the calendar and updated as a recurring report. The Summer 2026 edition: ~22 sessions per week across four metros, a $40 median ticket price, about one in three sessions free or by donation, and 71% starting after 5 p.m. Every figure is reproducible; the report is free to cite (please attribute "Sound Bath Calendar"). Dated editions are archived at https://soundbathcalendar.com/state-of-sound-healing/<edition>/.
